variants.name: 窃听者
variants.ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一段秘密短语。每局游戏至多两次，在白天时，说出这个短语的善良玩家会在当晚死亡，且你会得知他是谁。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the Eavesdropper and notify them what their phrase is. Then, put the Eavesdropper to sleep.
variants.otherNightReminder: If a player has the Eavesdropper's SAID PHRASE reminder token on them, they die. Mark them with the Eavesdropper's DEAD reminder token. Then, wake the Eavesdropper & point at the player they killed. Put the Eavesdropper to sleep.
